items.title: Finalist – Smart India Hackathon 2024
items.description:
🏆 Awarded by the Ministry of Education's Innovation Cell for Project TONY, an open-source educational robot transforming STEM learning.

Key Achievements:
✅ Built TONY – A modular, programmable robot for hands-on robotics education.
✅ Developed a Learning Platform – Using PHP Laravel & MySQL for interactive tutorials.
✅ Recognized Nationally – Selected among 315 winning teams at SIH 2024 Grand Finale.
✅ Validated by Experts – Endorsed by top evaluators and industry partners.

items.title: Winner CipherThon 2.0 | National Level Hackathon
items.description:
Proud to secure 1st place at CipherThon 2.0, a 24-hour national-level hackathon, with my team ByteBlazers! 🚀

Project: HIREZ – AI-Based Hiring Platform

✅ Built an AI-powered recruitment platform using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), VectorDB, Azure Cloud, and React.js.
✅ Streamlined hiring processes by integrating OpenAI services for document intelligence.
✅ Enhanced user experience with Figma-based UI design and React Components.
✅ Reduced load times by 40% with optimized React.js web pages.

items.title: Winners- Rajasthan Police Hackathon 1.0
items.description:
Our dynamic team, "Hackstormers" participated in Hackathon 1.0 by Rajasthan Police, showcasing our innovative skills and problem-solving mindset.

Our solution was focused on the improvement of the 1930 Helpline, a crucial communication channel for reporting cybercrimes and freezing funds related to these crimes.
- We have created an Automated Voice-Enabled System that allows users to file a Cyber Case through a Chatbot on the web portal built on Django Framework.
- Our system leverages various Large Language Models to provide a Chatbot feature that can interact with the users and guide them through the process and acts like AI Legal Decision System.
- Our system also uses our own trained data to enhance the performance and accuracy of the Chatbot and the Voice-Enabled System

items.title: 650+ DSA Problems Solved
items.description: Solved 650+ DSA problems across competitive coding platforms and participated in multiple coding contests.
